puzzle.hint: A divine promise of peace and security for those who are close to Him, protecting them from fear of the future and grief for the past.
puzzle.arabic: أَلَآ إِنَّ أَوْلِيَآءَ ٱللَّهِ لَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا هُمْ يَحْزَنُونَ
puzzle.verseEn: Unquestionably, [for] the allies of Allāh there will be no fear concerning them, nor will they grieve -
